title: [podman container clone] the container configuration is not identical completely after cloning container with multiple options at the same time
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->
Please see *Describe the results you received:* section.
```
212,214c203,205
<                "CpuShares": 0,
<                "Memory": 0,
<                "NanoCpus": 0,
---
>                "CpuShares": 1024,
>                "Memory": 4194304,
>                "NanoCpus": 200000000,
222,223c213,214
<                "CpuPeriod": 0,
<                "CpuQuota": 0,
---
>                "CpuPeriod": 100000,
>                "CpuQuota": 20000,
232,233c223,224
<                "MemorySwap": 0,
<                "MemorySwappiness": 0,
---
>                "MemorySwap": 8388608,
>                "MemorySwappiness": -1,
```
NOTE:  BTW, the #13868 can't fix above  **MemorySwappiness** issue when cloning container with multiple options at the same time, and the value are also different for CpuShares, Memory, NanoCpus, CpuPeriod, CpuQuota, MemorySwappiness and MemorySwap after cloning. 

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. ./bin/podman run -d --name myctr11 quay.io/libpod/alpine sleep 99999

2. ./bin/podman inspect myctr11 > myctr11

3. ./bin/podman container clone myctr11 --cpu-period=100000 --cpu-quota=20000 --cpu-shares=1024 --memory=4096k --name myctr11-clone

4. ./bin/podman inspect myctr11-clone > myctr11-clone

5.  diff myctr11 myctr11-clone

**Describe the results you received:**
```
[ajia@Fedora35 podman]$ diff myctr11 myctr11-clone
```

comments.body: I am kind of lost here @chuanchang are you saying its incorrect that the configs are not identical when given *new* resource limits? Also a bunch of these diffs are because the container is cloned (created) not running.
I will comb through this to look for more errors though

> I am kind of lost here @chuanchang are you saying its incorrect that the configs are not identical when given _new_ resource limits? Also a bunch of these diffs are because the container is cloned (created) not running.

Not exact, it also includes cloning and running container in "Describe the results you received:" section.

```
[ajia@Fedora35 podman]$ ./bin/podman run -d --name myctr22 quay.io/libpod/alpine sleep 99999
c1d2891b858e18bc6f90c72315bc128ab096d82d2fecd21b598d60e84e77f410

[ajia@Fedora35 podman]$ ./bin/podman container clone myctr22 --cpu-period=100000 --cpu-quota=20000 --cpu-shares=1024 --memory=4096k --memory-swap=-1 --memory-swappiness=101 --name myctr22-clone --run
d29a4eab075838ea90593c6c89f9f081c2128321e2bd739fe538ba9a137d0a0e
```
@chuanchang commented on JIRA regarding this. Everything here seems expected
